screen.autotorch.title: Auto Torch
screen.autotorch.range_hint: Wooden axe: left=A, right=B; for spheres A=center and A-B=radius
screen.autotorch.use_current_a: Set current pos as point A
screen.autotorch.use_current_b: Set current pos as point B
screen.autotorch.use_current_center: Set current pos as center C
screen.autotorch.use_current_radius: Set current pos as radius R
screen.autotorch.no_zone: There are no lighting areas or exclusions
screen.autotorch.too_many_exclusions: At most 32 exclusions can be added
screen.autotorch.no_lighting_zone: Set the A/B selection as the lighting area first
screen.autotorch.confirm_draft: Confirm or add the current blue draft first
screen.autotorch.zone_summary: Confirmed: %s lighting area, %s exclusions; draft is blue
screen.autotorch.edit_lighting.tooltip: Load the lighting area into the blue draft; adjust it, then click Set lighting area
screen.autotorch.edit_exclusion.tooltip: Load this exclusion into the blue draft; adjust it, then click Save exclusion
screen.autotorch.invalid_value: A coordinate or setting is invalid
message.autotorch.no_build_permission: You do not currently have build permission.
message.autotorch.area_too_large: Area too large: box axes are limited to %s blocks and sphere radius to %s blocks.
message.autotorch.outside_world: The area is outside this dimension's buildable bounds.
message.autotorch.started: Auto Torch started and will scan %s blocks in batches.
message.autotorch.no_task: No Auto Torch task is running.
message.autotorch.wrong_dimension: Auto Torch stopped because you changed dimension.
message.autotorch.max_reached: Placed %s torches and reached the configured limit.
message.autotorch.out_of_torches: Out of torches; stopped after placing %s.
message.autotorch.completed: Scan complete: placed %s torches and skipped %s unloaded positions.
message.autotorch.light_overlay_on: Light-risk overlay enabled: red means an all-time risk and yellow means a night-time risk.
